component.name: Aldur Appraiser
component.summary: Passive read-only reward-value overlay for Path of Exile 2

description.p: Aldur Appraiser is a passive, read-only overlay for Path of Exile 2. It reads the Runeshape Combinations panel of the Ezomyte Remnant, prices each reward option from poe2scout, and shows the value inline next to every choice so you can pick the best one at a glance.

ul.li: Inline value chips at each option, with the best choice highlighted.
Excludes the always-paid bonus reward from the ranking and marks rewards it cannot price as unknown rather than guessing.
Read-only by design: screen capture and OCR only, via the desktop screen-cast portal. No clipboard, input injection, or memory access.
Runs quietly in the system tray.

description.p: Use at your own risk: it only reads the screen and draws its own overlay, and is not endorsed by Grinding Gear Games.

More accurate pricing: an untracked or mis-read reward name no longer matches an unrelated currency that merely shares a word like "Rune" or "Orb" — it now stays unknown instead of showing a wrong price. Adds the Linux Flatpak build.
Unique-item rewards are now always shown as unknown, the reward ROI captures long option lists, and the inline overlay uses a compact surface to avoid compositor artifacts on other monitors.
